description: Search for contacts by filtering on properties, searching through associations, and sorting results

inputs.name: query
inputs.description: The search query string, up to 3000 characters

inputs.name: properties
inputs.description: Comma-separated list or array of properties to include in the response

inputs.name: limit
inputs.description: The maximum number of results to return (up to 200)

inputs.name: sorts
inputs.description: Comma-separated list or array of property names to sort by. Prefix with '-' for descending order (e.g., 'lastname' or '-createdAt')

inputs.name: after
inputs.description: A paging cursor token from the previous page response (from paging.next.after) for retrieving subsequent pages

outputs.name: contacts
outputs.description: Array of contact objects matching the search criteria

outputs.name: total
outputs.description: The total number of available results matching the search

outputs.name: paging_next_after
outputs.description: Cursor token for retrieving the next page of results (from paging.next.after)

outputs.name: paging_next_link
outputs.description: URL that can be used to retrieve the next page of results

outputs.name: paging_prev_before
outputs.description: Cursor token for retrieving the previous page of results (from paging.prev.before)

outputs.name: paging_prev_link
outputs.description: URL that can be used to retrieve the previous page of results
